cold-start-context.summary:
The 9th pass of the debug factorial experiment (34 cells) failed on ALL SAM3 conditions due to OOM in pre-training checks. DynUNet (8/8) and MambaVesselNet (not submitted) were unaffected. PR #967 fixed 18 bugs including the root causes (autocast, gradient checkpointing, LoRA freeze, exit codes, dimension order, eval ROI size).
This 10th pass re-runs ONLY the 18 cells that failed or were never tested: - 8 SAM3 TopoLoRA training conditions (OOM → now fixed by GC + autocast) - 8 SAM3 Hybrid training conditions (never submitted → now fixed) - 2 zero-shot baselines (never submitted → sam3_vanilla + vesselfm)
DynUNet and MambaVesselNet are EXCLUDED (already validated in 8th/9th pass).
cold-start-context.what-changed-since-9th-pass: PR #967 (merged 2026-03-26): "fix: doughnut-hole bug fixes + 39 new tests" Key fixes that affect this run: 1. Gradient checkpointing: VRAM ~22 GiB → ~10 GiB for SAM3 TopoLoRA on L4 2. LoRA freeze: Non-LoRA encoder params now frozen (648M → ~2M trainable) 3. Autocast in check_gradient_flow: prevents OOM in pre-training diagnostics 4. skip_gradient_flow when GC=true: skips diagnostic that would OOM 5. get_eval_roi_size (512,512,3): validation ~4 min instead of ~6 hours 6. Exit codes 33/34: SkyPilot EAGER_NEXT_REGION actually triggers 7. config_dict extraction: gradient_checkpointing propagates from Hydra 8. sam3_hybrid self.fusion(): GatedFeatureFusion actually used (was dead code) 9. Dimension order fix: get_volume_embeddings uses (B,C,H,W,D) 10. CPU bf16 guard: no crash on CPU-only machines

infrastructure-state.check: docker manifest inspect europe-north1-docker.pkg.dev/minivess-mlops/minivess/base:latest Must contain PR #967 code (gradient checkpointing, LoRA freeze, etc.) If stale: docker build + docker push FIRST
gsutil ls gs://minivess-mlops-dvc-data/files/md5/ | head -5 MiniVess + DeepVess data must be on GCS
sky check gcp sky gpus --cloud gcp | grep L4
dvc remote list Must show 'gcs' pointing to gs://minivess-mlops-dvc-data

cells-to-run.description: 18 cells that failed or were never submitted in the 9th pass. Using configs/factorial/debug.yaml parameters: - max_epochs: 2 - num_folds: 1 (fold-0 only) - max_train_volumes: 23 - max_val_volumes: 12 - batch_size: per model_overrides (SAM3=1, default=2)

cell-group.name: SAM3 TopoLoRA
cell-group.key-validation: - Pre-training checks pass (no OOM) - gradient_checkpointing=true propagated to Sam3Backbone - Only LoRA params are trainable (not 648M encoder) - Training completes 2 epochs without OOM - Validation uses (512,512,3) ROI (not default 128³)

cell-group.name: SAM3 Hybrid
cell-group.key-validation: - self.fusion() called in forward pass (not dead code) - SAM features fused via gated residual - Validation uses (512,512,3) ROI - Training completes 2 epochs

cell-group.name: Zero-Shot Baselines
cell-group.key-validation: - Zero-shot early return in training_flow (no training loop) - Correct eval_dataset propagated - MLflow run logged with ZERO_SHOT status

phase.name: Pre-Launch Validation
phase.description: Verify infrastructure is ready before spending cloud credits. ALL checks must pass before proceeding to Phase 1.

task.name: Verify Docker image contains PR #967 code
task.description:
The 9th pass failed partly because docker push silently failed to upload the code layer. Before launching, verify the GAR image contains the gradient checkpointing code.
Commands: docker manifest inspect europe-north1-docker.pkg.dev/minivess-mlops/minivess/base:latest # Check org.opencontainers.image.revision matches current HEAD
If stale: rebuild and push DOCKER_BUILDKIT=1 docker build -t minivess-base:latest -f deployment/docker/Dockerfile.base . docker tag minivess-base:latest europe-north1-docker.pkg.dev/minivess-mlops/minivess/base:latest docker push europe-north1-docker.pkg.dev/minivess-mlops/minivess/base:latest

task.name: Verify GCS data availability
task.description: Check MiniVess and DeepVess data are on GCS: gsutil ls gs://minivess-mlops-dvc-data/files/md5/ | wc -l dvc status -r gcs

task.name: Verify SkyPilot GCP credentials and L4 availability
task.description: sky check gcp sky gpus --cloud gcp | grep L4 # Verify at least 1 region has L4 spot availability

task.name: Run make test-staging to confirm code is green
task.description: make test-staging # Must be 6470+ passed, 0 failed

phase.name: Launch SAM3 Cells
phase.description:
Launch the 16 SAM3 training cells + 2 zero-shot baselines via run_factorial.sh. Use --models flag (if available) to restrict to SAM3 only, OR create a temporary factorial config that only includes the target models.
Strategy: Use run_factorial.sh with the full debug.yaml config but launch only the SAM3 conditions manually using sky jobs launch with per-condition env vars. This avoids modifying the config file.

task.name: Launch 8 SAM3 TopoLoRA cells
task.description:
Launch all 8 SAM3 TopoLoRA conditions via run_factorial.sh: ./scripts/run_factorial.sh --dry-run configs/factorial/debug.yaml # Verify grad_ckpt=true appears for sam3_topolora conditions # Then launch for real (remove --dry-run)
OR: Launch individually with sky jobs launch if run_factorial.sh doesn't support model filtering: for loss in cbdice_cldice dice_ce dice_ce_cldice bce_dice_05cldice; do for calib in true false; do sky jobs launch deployment/skypilot/train_factorial.yaml \ --name sam3_topolora-${loss}-calib${calib}-f0 \ --env MODEL_FAMILY=sam3_topolora \ --env LOSS_NAME=${loss} \ --env FOLD_ID=0 \ --env WITH_AUX_CALIB=${calib} \ --env BATCH_SIZE=1 \ --env GRAD_ACCUM_STEPS=4 \ --env GRADIENT_CHECKPOINTING=true \ --env MAX_EPOCHS=2 \ --env MAX_TRAIN_VOLUMES=23 \ --env MAX_VAL_VOLUMES=12 \ --env EXPERIMENT_NAME=debug_factorial \ --env POST_TRAINING_METHODS=none,swag \ --env-file .env \ -y sleep 10 # Rate limit done done
Monitor: sky jobs queue | grep sam3_topolora

task.name: Launch 8 SAM3 Hybrid cells
task.description: Same pattern as T5 but with MODEL_FAMILY=sam3_hybrid. Can launch in parallel with T5 (different model).

task.name: Launch 2 zero-shot baselines
task.description:
Zero-shot conditions: 1. sam3_vanilla on minivess (frozen encoder eval) 2. vesselfm on deepvess (zero-shot only)
sky jobs launch deployment/skypilot/train_factorial.yaml \ --name sam3_vanilla-none-calibfalse-f0 \ --env MODEL_FAMILY=sam3_vanilla \ --env LOSS_NAME=none \ --env FOLD_ID=0 \ --env ZERO_SHOT=true \ --env MAX_EPOCHS=0 \ --env EVAL_DATASET=minivess \ --env BATCH_SIZE=1 \ --env EXPERIMENT_NAME=debug_factorial \ --env-file .env \ -y
sky jobs launch deployment/skypilot/train_factorial.yaml \ --name vesselfm-none-calibfalse-f0 \ --env MODEL_FAMILY=vesselfm \ --env LOSS_NAME=none \ --env FOLD_ID=0 \ --env ZERO_SHOT=true \ --env MAX_EPOCHS=0 \ --env EVAL_DATASET=deepvess \ --env BATCH_SIZE=2 \ --env EXPERIMENT_NAME=debug_factorial \ --env-file .env \ -y

phase.name: Monitor and Diagnose
phase.description: Use /ralph-loop or /factorial-monitor to track all 18 jobs. Key signals to watch for: - Pre-training checks pass (no OOM) → PRIMARY validation - gradient_checkpointing=true in MLflow config artifact - Training epochs complete (epoch 0, epoch 1) - Validation DSC reported (even if low at 2 epochs) - SWAG post-training runs after training

task.name: Monitor all 18 jobs via factorial-monitor
task.description:
Use /factorial-monitor to track: sky jobs queue # All 18 should show RUNNING or SUCCEEDED
For each FAILED job: sky jobs logs JOB_ID # Diagnose: OOM? Setup error? Config issue?
Expected failure modes (that would indicate unfixed bugs): - "OOM" in pre_training_checks → GC not propagated (T2 fix failed) - "no gradient flow" → LoRA params not trainable (T1 fix failed) - "NaN" in encoder output → dimension order wrong (T4 fix failed) - "exit 1" in setup → exit codes not updated (T5 fix failed)

task.name: Validate fix-specific signals in MLflow
task.description:
For each completed SAM3 TopoLoRA run, verify: 1. config/resolved_config.yaml has gradient_checkpointing: true 2. diagnostics/pre_training_checks.json shows gradient_flow: SKIPPED 3. Trainable param count is ~2M (not ~648M) 4. Peak VRAM ~10 GiB (not ~22 GiB) — check from job logs 5. Validation took ~4 min (not ~6 hours) — check from timing artifact
For SAM3 Hybrid: 1. Forward pass includes gated fusion (check model output shape) 2. gate_alpha logged in MLflow params
For zero-shot: 1. Status: ZERO_SHOT in flow result 2. No training epochs logged

phase.name: Report Generation
phase.description: Generate the 10th pass report with per-cell results and fix validation.

task.name: Write 10th pass experiment report
task.description:
Output: docs/planning/v0-2_archive/original_docs/run-debug-factorial-experiment-report-10th-pass-report.md
Report must include: 1. Executive summary (18 cells, which passed, which failed) 2. Per-cell results table (condition, status, VRAM, wall-time, DSC) 3. Fix validation matrix (which PR #967 fixes were confirmed) 4. Remaining issues (if any cells still fail) 5. Go/no-go decision for full production run 6. Cost accounting (actual vs estimated)

excluded-cells.cell-group: All 8 DynUNet conditions passed in 8th pass at batch_size=2. No bugs in PR #967 affect DynUNet.
MambaVesselNet was not submitted in 9th pass but is a low-VRAM model. No bugs in PR #967 affect MambaVesselNet. Will be run in the full production pass.
